subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The Physician of hearts and wise Healer of bodies and souls hath arrived with utmost longing and joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حضرت طبیب قلوب و حکیم اجسام و ارواح در کمال اشواق و افراح وارد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @law of pilgrimage, @visitation Tablets
